message:
fix(safety): RAII streaming guard, path traversal hardening, and serialization safety

Replace manual AtomicBool set/clear for extensions_is_streaming with an
RAII AtomicBoolGuard that resets the flag on drop, preventing the flag
from getting stuck if an async task is cancelled mid-stream. Add
tracing::error for poisoned mutex cases in AgentSessionHostActions
rather than silently dropping messages.

Harden resolve_read_path to enforce cwd scope before probing the
filesystem — variant lookups (macOS screenshot names, NFD, curly quotes)
now verify candidates stay within the working directory. Refactor
HashlineEditTool to use the shared enforce_cwd_scope helper and provide
more specific error messages (NotFound vs PermissionDenied).

Handle SessionMessage serialization failure in rpc_session_message_value
gracefully with tracing::error instead of expect/panic, returning a JSON
error object so the RPC layer stays up.

Update FindTool test to use explicit mtime ordering instead of assuming
alphabetical sort, matching the actual mtime-sorted behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
